headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Amphenol (APH) After Its 97% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Amphenol's share price still offers value after a strong run, this breakdown will help you see how the current price lines up against different valuation checks. The stock last closed at US$148.64, with returns of 20.2% over 30 days, 6.4% year to date, and 97.3% over 1 year. This can change how investors think about both upside potential and risk.
